title: First Date | #shorts
full_text: Guys, you guys are both now in various stages of college life. You need to date somebody. You know that's why people go to college, right? >> Every time I meet somebody, you don't let me date them. >> That's not true. Yeah, you do make some bad choices. That has happened. >> So, how am I going to meet anybody? >> But you before you meet them, you explain to me what the circumstances. >> No girl wants to go on a first date with a boy's mother. >> Why? I'm not saying I have to actually sit in the whole date. >> Yes, you do. Because you follow them around. Let me just meet the person and if it looks good, you continue the date. >> He's allowed to be interested in people of all backgrounds. >> No. What are you talking about? >> WE'RE IN AMERICA. MOM, >> this house is the consulate of India in my house right now. Dictatorship. And I want you guys date Indian person. That is it. That is it. Full and final. Okay. But also I'm open-minded.
